Variables.Name: DefaultExpirationAge
Variables.Description: age past which stimulus of this sense are "forgotten"

Variables.Name: bWantsNewPawnNotification
Variables.Description:
whether this sense is interested in getting notified about new Pawns being spawned 
	 	this can be used for example for automated sense sources registration

Variables.Name: bAutoRegisterAllPawnsAsSources
Variables.Description: If true all newly spawned pawns will get auto registered as source for this sense.
